message.content: <local-command-caveat>Caveat: The messages below were generated by the user while running local commands. DO NOT respond to these messages or otherwise consider them in your response unless the user explicitly asks you to.</local-command-caveat>
in the widget music awesome is it possible to center the text ? like if the string is small center it

input.description: Find music widget in awesome config
input.prompt: Find the music widget configuration in the user's Awesome WM config. Look in ~/.config/awesome/ for files related to music, playerctl, or widgets. Show the relevant code for the music text widget, especially how text is displayed. Search thoroughly for terms like "music", "playerctl", "mpd", "spotify", "widget", "text". Return the file path and the relevant code sections.

content.text: Find the music widget configuration in the user's Awesome WM config. Look in ~/.config/awesome/ for files related to music, playerctl, or widgets. Show the relevant code for the music text widget, especially how text is displayed. Search thoroughly for terms like "music", "playerctl", "mpd", "spotify", "widget", "text". Return the file path and the relevant code sections.

data.prompt: Find the music widget configuration in the user's Awesome WM config. Look in ~/.config/awesome/ for files related to music, playerctl, or widgets. Show the relevant code for the music text widget, especially how text is displayed. Search thoroughly for terms like "music", "playerctl", "mpd", "spotify", "widget", "text". Return the file path and the relevant code sections.

input.command: find ~/.config/awesome/ -name "rc.lua" -o -name "init.lua" | grep -v lain | grep -v freedesktop | head -5

content.content:
1â†’-- Music widget using playerctl (for browser/Spotify/etc)
     2â†’local wibox = require("wibox")
     3â†’local awful = require("awful")
     4â†’local markup = require("lain.util.markup")
     5â†’local gears = require("gears")
     6â†’
     7â†’local music_text = wibox.widget.textbox()
     8â†’music_text.align = "center"
     9â†’local album_art = wibox.widget.imagebox()
    10â†’
    11â†’local text_scroll = wibox.container.scroll.horizontal(music_text, 40)
    12â†’local text_area = wibox.container.constraint(text_scroll, "exact", 24, nil)
    13â†’
    14â†’-- Create control buttons
    15â†’local prev_button = wibox.widget.textbox()
    16â†’local next_button = wibox.widget.textbox()
    17â†’
    18â†’-- Set initial button text
    19â†’prev_button:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#ffffff", "âŹ®")))
    20â†’next_button:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#ffffff", "âŹ­")))
    21â†’
    22â†’-- Set initial state: collapsed with music note
    23â†’prev_button.visible = false
    24â†’next_button.visible = false
    25â†’music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#ffffff", "â™Ş")))
    26â†’
    27â†’local function update_music()
    28â†’	-- Query all players, get the first one that is Playing or Paused
    29â†’	awful.spawn.easy_async_with_shell(
    30â†’		[[playerctl -a metadata --format '{{status}}|||{{artist}}|||{{title}}|||{{xesam:url}}|||{{mpris:artUrl}}' 2>/dev/null | grep -m1 '^Playing\|^Paused']],
    31â†’		function(stdout)
    32â†’			stdout = stdout:gsub("\n", ""):gsub("\r", ""):gsub("^%s*(.-)%s*$", "%1")
    33â†’
    34â†’			if stdout == "" then
    35â†’				album_art:set_image(nil)
    36â†’				prev_button.visible = false
    37â†’				next_button.visible = false
    38â†’				text_area.width = 24
    39â†’				music_text.align = "center"
    40â†’				music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#ffffff", "â™Ş")))
    41â†’				return
    42â†’			end
    43â†’
    44â†’			local artist, title, url, art_url = stdout:match("^[^|]+|||(.-)|||(.-)|||(.-)|||(.-)$")
    45â†’			artist = artist or ""
    46â†’			title = title or ""
    47â†’			url = url or ""
    48â†’			art_url = art_url or ""
    49â†’
    50â†’			-- Fallback to filename from URL if title is empty
    51â†’			if title == "" and url ~= "" then
    52â†’				title = url:match("([^/]+)$") or url
    53â†’				title = title:gsub("%%(%x%x)", function(h) return string.char(tonumber(h, 16)) end)
    54â†’				title = title:gsub("%.[^%.]+$", "")
    55â†’			end
    56â†’
    57â†’			local song
    58â†’			if artist ~= "" and title ~= "" then
    59â†’				song = artist .. " - " .. title
    60â†’			elseif title ~= "" then
    61â†’				song = title
    62â†’			else
    63â†’				song = ""
    64â†’			end
    65â†’
    66â†’			if song ~= "" and string.len(song) > 3 then
    67â†’				prev_button.visible = true
    68â†’				next_button.visible = true
    69â†’				text_area.width = 150
    70â†’				music_text.align = "left"
    71â†’				if art_url ~= "" and art_url ~= "file://" then
    72â†’					album_art:set_image(art_url:gsub("file://", ""))
    73â†’				else
    74â†’					album_art:set_image(nil)
    75â†’				end
    76â†’				local display = song:gsub("&", "&"):gsub("<", "<"):gsub(">", ">")
    77â†’				music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#ffffff", " " .. display .. " ")))
    78â†’			else
    79â†’				album_art:set_image(nil)
    80â†’				prev_button.visible = false
    81â†’				next_button.visible = false
    82â†’				text_area.width = 24
    83â†’				music_text.align = "center"
    84â†’				music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#ffffff", "â™Ş")))
    85â†’			end
    86â†’		end
    87â†’	)
    88â†’end
    89â†’
    90â†’local music_widget = wibox.container.background(
    91â†’	wibox.container.margin(
    92â†’		wibox.widget({
    93â†’			-- Left side with prev button
    94â†’			{
    95â†’				prev_button,
    96â†’				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
    97â†’			},
    98â†’			-- Center with album art and scrolling music text
    99â†’			{
   100â†’				album_art,
   101â†’				text_area,
   102â†’				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
   103â†’			},
   104â†’			-- Right side with next button
   105â†’			{
   106â†’				next_button,
   107â†’				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
   108â†’			},
   109â†’			layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal,
   110â†’		}),
   111â†’		2,
   112â†’		4
   113â†’	),
   114â†’	"#e84393",
   115â†’	gears.shape.rounded_rect
   116â†’)
   117â†’
   118â†’-- Make buttons clickable
   119â†’prev_button:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, function()
   120â†’	awful.spawn("playerctl previous")
   121â†’	-- Add a small delay before updating to allow the player to change
   122â†’	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
   123â†’		update_music()
   124â†’	end)
   125â†’end)))
   126â†’
   127â†’next_button:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, function()
   128â†’	awful.spawn("playerctl next")
   129â†’	-- Add a small delay before updating to allow the player to change
   130â†’	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
   131â†’		update_music()
   132â†’	end)
   133â†’end)))
   134â†’
   135â†’-- Make music text clickable for play/pause
   136â†’local function toggle_play_pause()
   137â†’	awful.spawn("playerctl play-pause")
   138â†’	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
   139â†’		update_music()
   140â†’	end)
   141â†’end
   142â†’music_text:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, toggle_play_pause)))
   143â†’text_scroll:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, toggle_play_pause)))
   144â†’
   145â†’-- Initial update
   146â†’update_music()
   147â†’
   148â†’-- Update every 2 seconds
   149â†’local timer = gears.timer({ timeout = 2 })
   150â†’timer:connect_signal("timeout", update_music)
   151â†’timer:start()
   152â†’
   153â†’return music_widget
   154â†’

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

1â†’--[[
     2â†’
     3â†’     Licensed under GNU General Public License v2
     4â†’      * (c) 2013, Luca CPZ
     5â†’      * (c) 2010, Adrian C. <anrxc@sysphere.org>
     6â†’
     7â†’--]]
     8â†’
     9â†’local helpers = require("lain.helpers")
    10â†’local shell = require("awful.util").shell
    11â†’local escape_f = require("awful.util").escape
    12â†’local focused = require("awful.screen").focused
    13â†’local naughty = require("naughty")
    14â†’local wibox = require("wibox")
    15â†’local os = { getenv = os.getenv }
    16â†’local string = { format = string.format, gmatch = string.gmatch, match = string.match }
    17â†’
    18â†’-- MPD infos
    19â†’-- lain.widget.mpd
    20â†’
    21â†’local function factory(args)
    22â†’	local mpd = { widget = wibox.widget.textbox() }
    23â†’	local args = args or {}
    24â†’	local timeout = args.timeout or 2
    25â†’	local password = (args.password and #args.password > 0 and string.format("password %s\\n", args.password)) or ""
    26â†’	local host = args.host or os.getenv("MPD_HOST") or "127.0.0.1"
    27â†’	local port = args.port or os.getenv("MPD_PORT") or "6600"
    28â†’	local music_dir = args.music_dir or os.getenv("HOME") .. "/Music"
    29â†’	local cover_pattern = args.cover_pattern or "*\\.(jpg|jpeg|png|gif)$"
    30â†’	local cover_size = args.cover_size or 100
    31â†’	local default_art = args.default_art
    32â†’	local notify = args.notify or "on"
    33â†’	local followtag = args.followtag or false
    34â†’	local settings = args.settings or function() end
    35â†’
    36â†’	local mpdh = string.format("telnet://%s:%s", host, port)
    37â†’	local echo = string.format('printf "%sstatus\\ncurrentsong\\nclose\\n"', password)
    38â†’	local cmd = string.format("%s | curl --connect-timeout 1 -fsm 3 %s", echo, mpdh)
    39â†’
    40â†’	mpd_notification_preset = { title = "Now playing", timeout = 6 }
    41â†’
    42â†’	helpers.set_map("current mpd track", nil)
    43â†’
    44â†’	function mpd.update()
    45â†’		helpers.async({ shell, "-c", cmd }, function(f)
    46â†’			mpd_now = {
    47â†’				random_mode = false,
    48â†’				single_mode = false,
    49â†’				repeat_mode = false,
    50â†’				consume_mode = false,
    51â†’				pls_pos = "N/A",
    52â†’				pls_len = "N/A",
    53â†’				state = "N/A",
    54â†’				file = "N/A",
    55â†’				name = "N/A",
    56â†’				artist = "N/A",
    57â†’				title = "N/A",
    58â†’				album = "N/A",
    59â†’				genre = "N/A",
    60â†’				track = "N/A",
    61â†’				date = "N/A",
    62â†’				time = "N/A",
    63â†’				elapsed = "N/A",
    64â†’			}
    65â†’
    66â†’			for line in string.gmatch(f, "[^\n]+") do
    67â†’				for k, v in string.gmatch(line, "([%w]+):[%s](.*)$") do
    68â†’					if k == "state" then
    69â†’						mpd_now.state = v
    70â†’					elseif k == "file" then
    71â†’						mpd_now.file = v
    72â†’					elseif k == "Name" then
    73â†’						mpd_now.name = escape_f(v)
    74â†’					elseif k == "Artist" then
    75â†’						mpd_now.artist = escape_f(v)
    76â†’					elseif k == "Title" then
    77â†’						mpd_now.title = escape_f(v)
    78â†’					elseif k == "Album" then
    79â†’						mpd_now.album = escape_f(v)
    80â†’					elseif k == "Genre" then
    81â†’						mpd_now.genre = escape_f(v)
    82â†’					elseif k == "Track" then
    83â†’						mpd_now.track = escape_f(v)
    84â†’					elseif k == "Date" then
    85â†’						mpd_now.date = escape_f(v)
    86â†’					elseif k == "Time" then
    87â†’						mpd_now.time = v
    88â†’					elseif k == "elapsed" then
    89â†’						mpd_now.elapsed = string.match(v, "%d+")
    90â†’					elseif k == "song" then
    91â†’						mpd_now.pls_pos = v
    92â†’					elseif k == "playlistlength" then
    93â†’						mpd_now.pls_len = v
    94â†’					elseif k == "repeat" then
    95â†’						mpd_now.repeat_mode = v ~= "0"
    96â†’					elseif k == "single" then
    97â†’						mpd_now.single_mode = v ~= "0"
    98â†’					elseif k == "random" then
    99â†’						mpd_now.random_mode = v ~= "0"
   100â†’					elseif k == "consume" then
   101â†’						mpd_now.consume_mode = v ~= "0"
   102â†’					end
   103â†’				end
   104â†’			end
   105â†’
   106â†’			mpd_notification_preset.text =
   107â†’				string.format("%s (%s) - %s\n%s", mpd_now.artist, mpd_now.album, mpd_now.date, mpd_now.title)
   108â†’			widget = mpd.widget
   109â†’			settings()
   110â†’
   111â†’			if mpd_now.state == "play" then
   112â†’				if notify == "on" and mpd_now.title ~= helpers.get_map("current mpd track") then
   113â†’					helpers.set_map("current mpd track", mpd_now.title)
   114â†’
   115â†’					if followtag then
   116â†’						mpd_notification_preset.screen = focused()
   117â†’					end
   118â†’
   119â†’					local common = {
   120â†’						preset = mpd_notification_preset,
   121â†’						icon = default_art,
   122â†’						icon_size = cover_size,
   123â†’						replaces_id = mpd.id,
   124â†’					}
   125â†’
   126â†’					if not string.match(mpd_now.file, "http.*://") then -- local file instead of http stream
   127â†’						local path = string.format("%s/%s", music_dir, string.match(mpd_now.file, ".*/"))
   128â†’						local cover = string.format(
   129â†’							"find '%s' -maxdepth 1 -type f | egrep -i -m1 '%s'",
   130â†’							path:gsub("'", "'\\''"),
   131â†’							cover_pattern
   132â†’						)
   133â†’						helpers.async({ shell, "-c", cover }, function(current_icon)
   134â†’							common.icon = current_icon:gsub("\n", "")
   135â†’							if #common.icon == 0 then
   136â†’								common.icon = nil
   137â†’							end
   138â†’							mpd.id = naughty.notify(common).id
   139â†’						end)
   140â†’					else
   141â†’						mpd.id = naughty.notify(common).id
   142â†’					end
   143â†’				end
   144â†’			elseif mpd_now.state ~= "pause" then
   145â†’				helpers.set_map("current mpd track", nil)
   146â†’			end
   147â†’		end)
   148â†’	end
   149â†’
   150â†’	mpd.timer = helpers.newtimer("mpd", timeout, mpd.update, true, true)
   151â†’
   152â†’	return mpd
   153â†’end
   154â†’
   155â†’return factory
   156â†’

     2â†’local wibox = require("wibox")
     3â†’local awful = require("awful")
     4â†’local markup = require("lain.util.markup")
     5â†’local gears = require("gears")
     6â†’
     7â†’local music_text = wibox.widget.textbox()
     8â†’music_text.align = "center"
     9â†’music_text.forced_width = 24
    10â†’local album_art = wibox.widget.imagebox()
    11â†’
    12â†’local text_scroll = wibox.container.scroll.horizontal(music_text, 40)
    13â†’local text_area = wibox.container.constraint(text_scroll, "exact", 24, nil)
    14â†’
    15â†’-- Create control buttons
    16â†’local prev_button = wibox.widget.textbox()
    17â†’local next_button = wibox.widget.textbox()
    18â†’
    19â†’-- Set initial button text with everforest colors
    20â†’prev_button:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#A7C080", "âŹ®")))
    21â†’next_button:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#A7C080", "âŹ­")))

    26â†’music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#D3C6AA", "â™Ş")))

    29â†’	-- Query all players, get the first one that is Playing or Paused
    30â†’	awful.spawn.easy_async_with_shell(
    31â†’		[[playerctl -a metadata --format '{{status}}|||{{artist}}|||{{title}}|||{{xesam:url}}|||{{mpris:artUrl}}' 2>/dev/null | grep -m1 '^Playing\|^Paused']],
    32â†’		function(stdout)
    33â†’			stdout = stdout:gsub("\n", ""):gsub("\r", ""):gsub("^%s*(.-)%s*$", "%1")
    34â†’

    36â†’				album_art:set_image(nil)
    37â†’				prev_button.visible = false
    38â†’				next_button.visible = false
    39â†’				text_area.width = 24
    40â†’				music_text.forced_width = 24
    41â†’				music_text.align = "center"
    42â†’				music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#859289", "â™Ş")))
    43â†’				return
    44â†’			end
    45â†’
    46â†’			local artist, title, url, art_url = stdout:match("^[^|]+|||(.-)|||(.-)|||(.-)|||(.-)$")
    47â†’			artist = artist or ""
    48â†’			title = title or ""
    49â†’			url = url or ""
    50â†’			art_url = art_url or ""
    51â†’
    52â†’			-- Fallback to filename from URL if title is empty
    53â†’			if title == "" and url ~= "" then
    54â†’				title = url:match("([^/]+)$") or url
    55â†’				title = title:gsub("%%(%x%x)", function(h) return string.char(tonumber(h, 16)) end)
    56â†’				title = title:gsub("%.[^%.]+$", "")
    57â†’			end
    58â†’
    59â†’			local song
    60â†’			if artist ~= "" and title ~= "" then
    61â†’				song = artist .. " - " .. title
    62â†’			elseif title ~= "" then
    63â†’				song = title
    64â†’			else
    65â†’				song = ""
    66â†’			end
    67â†’
    68â†’			if song ~= "" and string.len(song) > 3 then
    69â†’				prev_button.visible = true
    70â†’				next_button.visible = true
    71â†’				text_area.width = 150
    72â†’				music_text.forced_width = nil
    73â†’				music_text.align = "left"
    74â†’				if art_url ~= "" and art_url ~= "file://" then
    75â†’					album_art:set_image(art_url:gsub("file://", ""))
    76â†’				else
    77â†’					album_art:set_image(nil)
    78â†’				end
    79â†’				local display = song:gsub("&", "&"):gsub("<", "<"):gsub(">", ">")
    80â†’				music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#D3C6AA", " " .. display .. " ")))
    81â†’			else

    91â†’	)
    92â†’end
    93â†’
    94â†’local music_widget = wibox.container.background(
    95â†’	wibox.container.margin(
    96â†’		wibox.widget({
    97â†’			-- Left side with prev button
    98â†’			{
    99â†’				prev_button,
   100â†’				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
   101â†’			},
   102â†’			-- Center with album art and scrolling music text
   103â†’			{
   104â†’				album_art,
   105â†’				text_area,
   106â†’				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
   107â†’			},
   108â†’			-- Right side with next button
   109â†’			{
   110â†’				next_button,
   111â†’				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
   112â†’			},
   113â†’			layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal,
   114â†’		}),
   115â†’		2,
   116â†’		4
   117â†’	),
   118â†’	"#425047",
   119â†’	gears.shape.rounded_rect
   120â†’)
   121â†’
   122â†’-- Make buttons clickable
   123â†’prev_button:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, function()
   124â†’	awful.spawn("playerctl previous")
   125â†’	-- Add a small delay before updating to allow the player to change
   126â†’	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
   127â†’		update_music()
   128â†’	end)
   129â†’end)))
   130â†’
   131â†’next_button:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, function()
   132â†’	awful.spawn("playerctl next")
   133â†’	-- Add a small delay before updating to allow the player to change
   134â†’	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
   135â†’		update_music()
   136â†’	end)
   137â†’end)))
   138â†’
   139â†’-- Make music text clickable for play/pause
   140â†’local function toggle_play_pause()
   141â†’	awful.spawn("playerctl play-pause")
   142â†’	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
   143â†’		update_music()
   144â†’	end)
   145â†’end
   146â†’music_text:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, toggle_play_pause)))
   147â†’text_scroll:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, toggle_play_pause)))
   148â†’
   149â†’-- Initial update
   150â†’update_music()
   151â†’
   152â†’-- Update every 2 seconds
   153â†’local timer = gears.timer({ timeout = 2 })
   154â†’timer:connect_signal("timeout", update_music)
   155â†’timer:start()
   156â†’
   157â†’return music_widget
   158â†’

Perfect! I've found the music widget configuration. Here's my complete report:

## Music Widget Configuration Found

I found several music widget configurations in your Awesome WM setup. All are playerctl-based implementations with theme-specific color variations.

### Primary Files:

1. **Main music widget configuration:**
   `/home/tymoyato/.config/awesome/widgets_config/music_widget.lua`

2. **Theme-specific versions:**
   - `/home/tymoyato/.config/awesome/themes/everforest/widgets_config/music_widget.lua`
   - `/home/tymoyato/.config/awesome/themes/cccp/widgets_config/music_widget.lua`

3. **Lain library MPD widget (alternative):**
   `/home/tymoyato/.config/awesome/lain/widget/mpd.lua`

### Music Text Widget Display Code:

The music widget uses a `wibox.widget.textbox()` for displaying music information. Here's how text is displayed:

**Text Widget Creation:**
```lua
local music_text = wibox.widget.textbox()
music_text.align = "center"
```

**Text Display with Markup (when music is playing):**
```lua
local display = song:gsub("&", "&"):gsub("<", "<"):gsub(">", ">")
music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#ffffff", " " .. display .. " ")))
```

**Text Display when idle (music note symbol):**
```lua
music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#ffffff", "â™Ş")))
```

### Key Features:

- **Playerctl Integration:** Uses `playerctl -a metadata` to query all active music players
- **Dynamic Text:** Displays "Artist - Title" format when music plays
- **Scrolling Container:** Text is wrapped in `wibox.container.scroll.horizontal()` for long titles
- **Theme Colors:** Different color schemes per theme (white #ffffff for default, #D3C6AA for Everforest, #FFD700 for CCCP)
- **Responsive Width:** Changes from 24px (music note) to 150px (playing) based on music state
- **Update Interval:** Refreshes every 2 seconds via `gears.timer`
- **HTML Entity Escaping:** Properly escapes `&`, `<`, and `>` characters for safe display

The widget also includes clickable previous/next buttons and the text area itself is clickable for play/pause control.

file.content:
-- Music widget using playerctl (for browser/Spotify/etc)
local wibox = require("wibox")
local awful = require("awful")
local markup = require("lain.util.markup")
local gears = require("gears")

local music_text = wibox.widget.textbox()
music_text.align = "center"
local album_art = wibox.widget.imagebox()

local text_scroll = wibox.container.scroll.horizontal(music_text, 40)
local text_area = wibox.container.constraint(text_scroll, "exact", 24, nil)

-- Create control buttons
local prev_button = wibox.widget.textbox()
local next_button = wibox.widget.textbox()

-- Set initial button text
prev_button:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#ffffff", "âŹ®")))
next_button:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#ffffff", "âŹ­")))

-- Set initial state: collapsed with music note
prev_button.visible = false
next_button.visible = false
music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#ffffff", "â™Ş")))

local function update_music()
	-- Query all players, get the first one that is Playing or Paused
	awful.spawn.easy_async_with_shell(
		[[playerctl -a metadata --format '{{status}}|||{{artist}}|||{{title}}|||{{xesam:url}}|||{{mpris:artUrl}}' 2>/dev/null | grep -m1 '^Playing\|^Paused']],
		function(stdout)
			stdout = stdout:gsub("\n", ""):gsub("\r", ""):gsub("^%s*(.-)%s*$", "%1")

			if stdout == "" then
				album_art:set_image(nil)
				prev_button.visible = false
				next_button.visible = false
				text_area.width = 24
				music_text.align = "center"
				music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#ffffff", "â™Ş")))
				return
			end

			local artist, title, url, art_url = stdout:match("^[^|]+|||(.-)|||(.-)|||(.-)|||(.-)$")
			artist = artist or ""
			title = title or ""
			url = url or ""
			art_url = art_url or ""

			-- Fallback to filename from URL if title is empty
			if title == "" and url ~= "" then
				title = url:match("([^/]+)$") or url
				title = title:gsub("%%(%x%x)", function(h) return string.char(tonumber(h, 16)) end)
				title = title:gsub("%.[^%.]+$", "")
			end

			local song
			if artist ~= "" and title ~= "" then
				song = artist .. " - " .. title
			elseif title ~= "" then
				song = title
			else
				song = ""
			end

			if song ~= "" and string.len(song) > 3 then
				prev_button.visible = true
				next_button.visible = true
				text_area.width = 150
				music_text.align = "left"
				if art_url ~= "" and art_url ~= "file://" then
					album_art:set_image(art_url:gsub("file://", ""))
				else
					album_art:set_image(nil)
				end
				local display = song:gsub("&", "&"):gsub("<", "<"):gsub(">", ">")
				music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#ffffff", " " .. display .. " ")))
			else
				album_art:set_image(nil)
				prev_button.visible = false
				next_button.visible = false
				text_area.width = 24
				music_text.align = "center"
				music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#ffffff", "â™Ş")))
			end
		end
	)
end

local music_widget = wibox.container.background(
	wibox.container.margin(
		wibox.widget({
			-- Left side with prev button
			{
				prev_button,
				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
			},
			-- Center with album art and scrolling music text
			{
				album_art,
				text_area,
				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
			},
			-- Right side with next button
			{
				next_button,
				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
			},
			layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal,
		}),
		2,
		4
	),
	"#e84393",
	gears.shape.rounded_rect
)

-- Make buttons clickable
prev_button:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, function()
	awful.spawn("playerctl previous")
	-- Add a small delay before updating to allow the player to change
	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
		update_music()
	end)
end)))

next_button:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, function()
	awful.spawn("playerctl next")
	-- Add a small delay before updating to allow the player to change
	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
		update_music()
	end)
end)))

-- Make music text clickable for play/pause
local function toggle_play_pause()
	awful.spawn("playerctl play-pause")
	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
		update_music()
	end)
end
music_text:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, toggle_play_pause)))
text_scroll:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, toggle_play_pause)))

-- Initial update
update_music()

-- Update every 2 seconds
local timer = gears.timer({ timeout = 2 })
timer:connect_signal("timeout", update_music)
timer:start()

return music_widget

content.text: The fix is simple â€” on line 70, `music_text.align` is set to `"left"` when music is playing. Change it to `"center"`.

content.text:
Done. Now the text will be centered within the 150px area when music is playing. Short strings will appear centered, and long strings will still scroll normally.

You may need to restart Awesome (`Super+Ctrl+r`) for the change to take effect.
